info.title: Services Settings API
info.description: Write endpoints for managing business services. Read operations use GET /platform/v1/services; create and update operations use /v2/settings/services.

post.description:
## Overview
Creates a new service for the business. This is the write endpoint for services — the read-only list is at `GET /platform/v1/services`.

Available for **Staff tokens**.

## Important
`POST /platform/v1/services` does NOT exist (returns 404). Always use this endpoint (`POST /v2/settings/services`) to create services.

name.description: Display name of the service (e.g., "Executive Strategy Consultation").

service_type.description: The kind of service to create. Use `appointment` for standard one-on-one services (default) or `event` for group events/workshops.

duration.description: Duration of the service in minutes (e.g., 30, 45, 60).

charge_type.description: How the service is charged. `no_price` for free services, `paid` for priced services, `free` for explicitly free services.

price.description: Price of the service in the smallest currency unit. Set to 0 for free services.

interaction_type.description: How and where the service is delivered. Face-to-face types: `default_business_location` (uses the business address on file), `business_location` (custom address — provide in `meeting_interaction_details`), `client_location` (client provides location). Phone types: `business_phone` (provide number in `meeting_interaction_details`), `client_phone` (client provides number). Online types: `online` (provide URL in `meeting_interaction_details`), `zoom` (auto-generated Zoom link), `skype` (provide Skype name in `meeting_interaction_details`).

meeting_interaction_details.description: Location/contact details for the service. The meaning depends on `interaction_type`: address for `business_location`, phone number for `business_phone`, URL for `online`, Skype name for `skype`. Required when `interaction_type` is `business_location`, `business_phone`, `online`, or `skype`. Not needed for `default_business_location`, `client_location`, `client_phone`, or `zoom` (these are auto-resolved or client-provided).

description.description: A detailed description of the service shown to clients.

display.description: Whether the service is visible in the client-facing booking page. Defaults to true.

approval_mode.description: How bookings for this service are approved. `immediate` for auto-approval, `manual` for staff review.

staff_data.description: Array of staff assignment objects. Each object maps a staff member to this service. The booking system uses this to determine which staff members can offer this service — if omitted, no staff will be associated and booking attempts will fail with 'The provided staff member doesn't offer the provided service'.

enabled.description: Whether the staff member is enabled for this service. Set to true to allow the staff member to offer this service.

category.description: The category to assign the service to. Required — services without a category will not appear in the settings UI or be queryable.

uid.description: UID of an existing category. Can be obtained from GET /v2/settings/categories.

application/json.name: Executive Strategy Consultation
application/json.description: A focused consultation for business planning.
